name: Stuffed Zucchini #1
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the zucchini lengthwise in half.
2. Scoop out the pulp, leaving a 1/4-inch wall. Chop the pulp and set aside.
3. Place the zucchini shells cut sides down in a dish.
4. Cover loosely and microwave on high (100%) until crisp tender, about 5 to 6 minutes.
5. Cover and microwave the reserved pulp, onions, and margarine in a 1 1/2-quart casserole or bowl on high (100%) until tender, 6 to 7 minutes.
6. Stir together bread cubes, cheese, tomato, salt, and pepper.
7. Turn zucchini shell cut sides up and spoon the mixture into shells.
8. Cover loosely and microwave on high (100%) until hot, 2 to 3 minutes.
